en: I am the man who has seen affliction under the rod of his wrath;
zh: 我是在耶和華忿怒的杖下受過苦的人。

en: he has driven and brought me into darkness without any light;
zh: 他領我，使我行在黑暗中，不行在光明裡。

en: surely against me he turns his hand again and again the whole day long.
zh: 他真是終日不停地反手攻擊我。

en: He has made my flesh and my skin waste away; he has broken my bones;
zh: 他使我的肌膚衰殘，折斷我的骨頭。

en: he has besieged and enveloped me with bitterness and tribulation;
zh: 他築壘圍困我，使毒害和艱難環繞我。

en: he has made me dwell in darkness like the dead of long ago.
zh: 他使我住在黑暗之處，好像死了許久的人一樣。

en: He has walled me about so that I cannot escape; he has made my chains heavy;
zh: 他築牆圍住我，使我不能逃出去； 他又加重我的鋼鍊。

en: though I call and cry for help, he shuts out my prayer;
zh: 甚至我哀求呼救的時候，他也掩耳不聽我的禱告。

en: he has blocked my ways with blocks of stones; he has made my paths crooked.
zh: 他用砍鑿好的石頭堵塞我的道路， 他使我的路徑曲折。

en: He is a bear lying in wait for me, a lion in hiding;
zh: 他像熊埋伏著，又像獅子在藏匿的地方，等候攻擊我。

en: he turned aside my steps and tore me to pieces; he has made me desolate;
zh: 他把我拖離大路，把我撕碎，棄我於荒野。

en: he bent his bow and set me as a target for his arrow.
zh: 他拉開了他的弓，立我作箭靶子。

en: He drove into my kidneys the arrows of his quiver;
zh: 他把他箭囊中的箭，射進我的肺腑。

en: I have become the laughingstock of all peoples, the object of their taunts all day long.
zh: 我成了眾民譏笑的對象，他們終日以我為歌嘲諷我 。

en: He has filled me with bitterness; he has sated me with wormwood.
zh: 他使我飽嘗苦菜，飽享苦堇。

en: He has made my teeth grind on gravel, and made me cower in ashes;
zh: 他用沙石使我的牙齒破碎，把我踐踏在灰塵中。

en: my soul is bereft of peace; I have forgotten what happiness is;
zh: 你使我失去了平安，我已忘記了福樂是甚麼。

en: so I say, "My endurance has perished; so has my hope from the LORD."
zh: 所以我說：“我的力量已消失了， 我從耶和華所得的盼望也沒有了。”

en: Remember my affliction and my wanderings, the wormwood and the gall!
zh: 回憶起我的困苦飄流，就像是苦堇和毒草。

en: My soul continually remembers it and is bowed down within me.
zh: 每逢我的心想起往事，我的心就消沉。

en: But this I call to mind, and therefore I have hope:
zh: 但我的心一想起下面這件事，我就有指望。

en: The steadfast love of the LORD never ceases; his mercies never come to an end;
zh: 耶和華的慈愛永不斷絕，他的憐憫永不止息。

en: they are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.
zh: 每天早晨都是新的；你的信實多麼廣大！

en: "The LORD is my portion," says my soul, "therefore I will hope in him."
zh: 我心裡說：“耶和華是我的業分，所以，我必仰望他。”

en: The LORD is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.
zh: 耶和華善待等候他的和心裡尋求他的人。

en: It is good that one should wait quietly for the salvation of the LORD.
zh: 安靜等候耶和華的救恩，是多麼的美好！

en: It is good for a man that he bear the yoke in his youth.
zh: 人在幼年時就負軛，是多麼的美好！

en: Let him sit alone in silence when it is laid on him;
zh: 他要無言獨坐，因為這是耶和華加在他身上的。

en: let him put his mouth in the dust- there may yet be hope;
zh: 他要把自己的口埋於塵土中，或者還有盼望。

en: let him give his cheek to the one who strikes, and let him be filled with insults.
zh: 他要讓人打他的臉頰，要飽受凌辱。

en: For the Lord will not cast off forever,
zh: 主必不會永遠丟棄人。

en: but, though he cause grief, he will have compassion according to the abundance of his steadfast love;
zh: 他雖然使人憂愁，卻必照著他豐盛的慈愛施憐憫。

en: for he does not willingly afflict or grieve the children of men.
zh: 因為他心裡本不是要人受困苦，或是要世人愁苦。

en: To crush underfoot all the prisoners of the earth,
zh: 人把地上所有被囚的，都踐踏在腳下，

en: to deny a man justice in the presence of the Most High,
zh: 或在至高者面前，屈枉正直，

en: to subvert a man in his lawsuit, the Lord does not approve.
zh: 或在訴訟的事上顛倒是非，主不都看見嗎？

en: Who has spoken and it came to pass, unless the Lord has commanded it?
zh: 除非主命定，誰能說成，就成了呢？

en: Is it not from the mouth of the Most High that good and bad come?
zh: 或禍或福，不都是出於至高者的口嗎？

en: Why should a living man complain, a man, about the punishment of his sins?
zh: 人活在世上，因自己的罪受懲罰，為甚麼發怨言呢？

en: Let us test and examine our ways, and return to the LORD!
zh: 我們要檢討和省察自己的行為，然後歸向耶和華。

en: Let us lift up our hearts and hands to God in heaven:
zh: 我們要向天上的 神，誠心舉手禱告：

en: "We have transgressed and rebelled, and you have not forgiven.
zh: “我們犯罪悖逆，你並不赦免。

en: "You have wrapped yourself with anger and pursued us, killing without pity;
zh: 你被怒氣籠罩著，你追趕我們，殺戮我們，毫不顧惜。

en: you have wrapped yourself with a cloud so that no prayer can pass through.
zh: 你用密雲把自己遮蔽起來，以致我們的禱告不能達到你那裡。

en: You have made us scum and garbage among the peoples.
zh: 你使我們在萬族中，成了渣滓和廢物。

en: "All our enemies open their mouths against us;
zh: 我們所有的仇敵，都張開口攻擊我們。

en: panic and pitfall have come upon us, devastation and destruction;
zh: 我們遭遇的，只是恐懼、陷阱、毀壞和滅亡。”

en: my eyes flow with rivers of tears because of the destruction of the daughter of my people.
zh: 我的眼淚像江河流下，都因我的人民的滅亡。

en: "My eyes will flow without ceasing, without respite,
zh: 我的眼淚湧流不停，總不止息，

en: until the LORD from heaven looks down and sees;
zh: 直到耶和華垂顧，從天上關注。

en: my eyes cause me grief at the fate of all the daughters of my city.
zh: 因眼見我城中眾民的遭遇，我的心很痛苦。

en: "I have been hunted like a bird by those who were my enemies without cause;
zh: 那些無故與我為敵的人追捕我，像追捕雀鳥一樣。

en: they flung me alive into the pit and cast stones on me;
zh: 他們把我投在坑中要結束我的性命，又把石頭拋在我身上；

en: water closed over my head; I said, 'I am lost.'
zh: 水淹過我的頭，我說：“我要死了！”

en: "I called on your name, O LORD, from the depths of the pit;
zh: 耶和華啊，我從坑的最深處呼求你的名，

en: you heard my plea, 'Do not close your ear to my cry for help!'
zh: 你曾經垂聽我的聲音，現在求你不要掩耳不聽我求救的呼聲。

en: You came near when I called on you; you said, 'Do not fear!'
zh: 我每逢呼求你的時候，你就靠近我，說：“不要懼怕！”

en: "You have taken up my cause, O Lord; you have redeemed my life.
zh: 主啊！你為我的案件申辯，贖回了我的性命。

en: You have seen the wrong done to me, O LORD; judge my cause.
zh: 耶和華啊，你看見了我的冤屈，求你為我主持公道。

en: You have seen all their vengeance, all their plots against me.
zh: 你已看見了他們種種的仇恨，以及所有害我的陰謀。

en: "You have heard their taunts, O LORD, all their plots against me.
zh: 耶和華啊！你已聽見了他們的辱罵，以及所有害我的計謀；

en: The lips and thoughts of my assailants are against me all the day long.
zh: 你也聽見了那些起來攻擊我的人嘴裡的話，以及他們終日要攻擊我的企圖。

en: Behold their sitting and their rising; I am the object of their taunts.
zh: 你看，他們或坐下或起來，我都成了他們歌唱嘲笑的對象。

en: "You will repay them, O LORD, according to the work of their hands.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你按著他們手所作的，報應他們！

en: You will give them dullness of heart; your curse will be on them.
zh: 求你使他們的心頑梗，願你的咒詛臨到他們。

en: You will pursue them in anger and destroy them from under your heavens, O LORD."
zh: 求你在烈怒中追趕他們，從耶和華管治的天下除滅他們。
